name: IdsEdwBillEntyPendEligDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS ( SELECT BILL_ENTY_PEND_ELIG_SK, BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY, BILL_DUE_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, BILL_ENTY_SK, BILL_ENTY_PEND_UNTIL_PD_IN, SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DTM, SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BILL_ENTY_PEND_ELIG ) SELECT cte_source.BILL_ENTY_PEND_ELIG_SK AS BILL_ENTY_PEND_ELIG_SK, cte_source.BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY AS BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY, cte_source.BILL_DUE_DT_SK AS BILL_DUE_DT_SK, cte_source.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_source.BILL_ENTY_SK AS BILL_ENTY_SK, cte_source.BILL_ENTY_PEND_UNTIL_PD_IN AS BILL_ENTY_PEND_UNTIL_PD_IN, cte_source.SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DTM AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_DTM, cte_source.SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID AS SRC_SYS_LAST_UPDT_USER_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_source.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK_2 FROM cte_source

OUTPUTS: Sequential file for database loading
